parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ad_stats (ad_id, date, shows, confirmed_shows, clicks, money, postbacks_count, postbacks_confirmed_money, ctr, cpc, roi, profit)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  '{{ $json.date }}',
  {{ $json.shows }},
  {{ $json.confirmed_shows }},
  {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.money }},
  {{ $json.postbacks_count }},
  {{ $json.postbacks_confirmed_money }},
  {{ $json.ctr }},
  {{ $json.cpc }},
  {{ $json.roi }},
  {{ $json.profit }}
)
ON CONFLICT (ad_id, date)
DO UPDATE SET
  shows = EXCLUDED.shows,
  confirmed_shows = EXCLUDED.confirmed_shows,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  money = EXCLUDED.money,
  postbacks_count = EXCLUDED.postbacks_count,
  postbacks_confirmed_money = EXCLUDED.postbacks_confirmed_money,
  ctr = EXCLUDED.ctr,
  cpc = EXCLUDED.cpc,
  roi = EXCLUDED.roi,
  profit = EXCLUDED.profit,
  collected_at = NOW();

SELECT param5 AS ad_id, DATE(created_at) AS lead_date, COUNT(*) AS crm_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS crm_depositors, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue FROM leads WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY param5, DATE(created_at)

INSERT INTO ad_stats (ad_id, date, crm_leads, crm_depositors, crm_revenue)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  '{{ $json.date }}',
  {{ $json.crm_leads }},
  {{ $json.crm_depositors }},
  {{ $json.crm_revenue }}
)
ON CONFLICT (ad_id, date)
DO UPDATE SET
  crm_leads = EXCLUDED.crm_leads,
  crm_depositors = EXCLUDED.crm_depositors,
  crm_revenue = EXCLUDED.crm_revenue,
  collected_at = NOW();
